/usr/bin/ar qc lib/libmna_solver.a CMakeFiles/mna_solver_static.dir/src/matrix.c.o CMakeFiles/mna_solver_static.dir/src/solver/core.c.o CMakeFiles/mna_solver_static.dir/src/solver/dc.c.o CMakeFiles/mna_solver_static.dir/src/solver/ac.c.o CMakeFiles/mna_solver_static.dir/src/solver/transient.c.o CMakeFiles/mna_solver_static.dir/elements/passive.c.o CMakeFiles/mna_solver_static.dir/elements/sources.c.o CMakeFiles/mna_solver_static.dir/elements/nonlinear/nonlinear.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib lib/libmna_solver.a
